1256	@with_native_function
1257	def compute_declaration_yaml(f: NativeFunction) -> object:
1258	    returns, name_to_field_name = compute_returns_yaml(f)
1259	
1260	    # These sets are used to conveniently test if an argument is a
1261	    # kwarg-only or out argument
1262	    kwarg_only_set = {a.name for a in f.func.arguments.flat_kwarg_only}
1263	    out_arg_set = {a.name for a in f.func.arguments.out}
1264	
1265	    sig_group = CppSignatureGroup.from_native_function(
1266	        f, method=False, fallback_binding=False
1267	    )
1268	    cpp_args = sig_group.signature.arguments()
1269	    arguments = [
1270	        compute_cpp_argument_yaml(
1271	            cpp_a,
1272	            schema_order=False,
1273	            kwarg_only_set=kwarg_only_set,
1274	            out_arg_set=out_arg_set,
1275	            name_to_field_name=name_to_field_name,
1276	        )
1277	        for cpp_a in cpp_args
1278	    ]
1279	
1280	    schema_order_jit_arguments = list(f.func.schema_order_arguments())
1281	
1282	    schema_order_arguments = [
1283	        compute_argument_yaml(
1284	            a,
1285	            schema_order=True,
1286	            kwarg_only_set=kwarg_only_set,
1287	            out_arg_set=out_arg_set,
1288	            name_to_field_name=name_to_field_name,
1289	        )
1290	        for a in schema_order_jit_arguments
1291	    ]
1292	
1293	    cpp_schema_order_types = [
1294	        # NB: method here doesn't matter
1295	        r.type
1296	        for a in schema_order_jit_arguments
1297	        for r in cpp.argument(
1298	            a,
1299	            method=False,
1300	            cpp_no_default_args=set(),
1301	            faithful=False,
1302	            symint=False,
1303	            has_tensor_options=False,
1304	        )
1305	    ]
1306	
1307	    # legacy, report ints
1308	    cpp_returns = cpp.returns_type(f.func.returns, symint=False).cpp_type()
1309	    schema_order_cpp_signature = f"{cpp_returns} ({', '.join(cpp_schema_order_types)})"
1310	
1311	    is_factory_method = (
1312	        any(isinstance(a.argument, TensorOptionsArguments) for a in cpp_args)
1313	        and Variant.method not in f.variants
1314	    )
1315	
1316	    return OrderedDict(
1317	        [
1318	            ("name", cpp.name(f.func)),
1319	            ("operator_name", str(f.func.name.name)),
1320	            ("overload_name", str(f.func.name.overload_name)),
1321	            ("manual_kernel_registration", f.manual_kernel_registration),
1322	            (
1323	                "category_override",
1324	                f.category_override if f.category_override is not None else "",
1325	            ),
1326	            ("schema_string", f"aten::{f.func}"),
1327	            ("arguments", arguments),
1328	            ("schema_order_cpp_signature", schema_order_cpp_signature),
1329	            ("schema_order_arguments", schema_order_arguments),
1330	            ("method_of", compute_method_of_yaml(f.variants)),
1331	            ("mode", "native"),
1332	            ("python_module", "" if f.python_module is None else f.python_module),
1333	            ("returns", returns),
1334	            ("inplace", f.func.name.name.inplace),
1335	            ("is_factory_method", is_factory_method),
1336	            ("abstract", f.is_abstract),
1337	            ("device_guard", f.device_guard),
1338	            ("with_gil", False),
1339	            ("deprecated", False),
1340	            ("has_math_kernel", f.has_composite_implicit_autograd_kernel),
1341	        ]
1342	    )

1346	def has_autogenerated_composite_kernel(f: NativeFunction) -> bool:
1347	    return (f.structured or f.structured_delegate is not None) and (
1348	        f.func.kind() == SchemaKind.functional or f.func.kind() == SchemaKind.inplace
1349	    )

1352	@with_native_function_and_indices
1353	def compute_registration_declarations(
1354	    f: NativeFunction, backend_indices: dict[DispatchKey, BackendIndex]
1355	) -> str:
1356	    name = dispatcher.name(f.func)
1357	    returns_type = dispatcher.returns_type(f.func.returns).cpp_type()
1358	    args = dispatcher.arguments(f.func)
1359	    args_str = ", ".join(a.no_default().decl() for a in args)
1360	    comment_data: dict[str, str] = {
1361	        "schema": f"aten::{f.func}",
1362	        # TODO: What exactly is the semantics of the 'dispatch' field?
1363	        "dispatch": str(
1364	            {k for k, v in backend_indices.items() if v.has_kernel(f)}
1365	            != {DispatchKey.CompositeImplicitAutograd}
1366	            and {k for k, v in backend_indices.items() if v.has_kernel(f)}
1367	            != {
1368	                DispatchKey.CompositeImplicitAutograd,
1369	                DispatchKey.CompositeImplicitAutogradNestedTensor,
1370	            }
1371	        ),
1372	        "default": str(f.has_composite_kernel or has_autogenerated_composite_kernel(f)),
1373	    }
1374	    return f"""{returns_type} {name}({args_str}); // {json.dumps(comment_data)}
1375	"""

1385	def get_custom_build_selector(
1386	    provided_op_registration_allowlist: list[str] | None,
1387	    op_selection_yaml_path: str | None,
1388	) -> SelectiveBuilder:
1389	    if (
1390	        provided_op_registration_allowlist is not None
1391	        and op_selection_yaml_path is not None
1392	    ):
1393	        raise AssertionError(
1394	            "Both provided_op_registration_allowlist and op_selection_yaml_path "
1395	            "can NOT be provided at the same time."
1396	        )
1397	
1398	    op_registration_allowlist: set[str] | None = None
1399	    if provided_op_registration_allowlist is not None:
1400	        op_registration_allowlist = set(provided_op_registration_allowlist)
1401	
1402	    if op_registration_allowlist is not None:
1403	        selector = SelectiveBuilder.from_legacy_op_registration_allow_list(
1404	            op_registration_allowlist,
1405	            True,
1406	            False,
1407	        )
1408	    elif op_selection_yaml_path is not None:
1409	        selector = SelectiveBuilder.from_yaml_path(op_selection_yaml_path)
1410	    else:
1411	        selector = SelectiveBuilder.get_nop_selector()
1412	
1413	    return selector

1416	def get_grouped_by_view_native_functions(
1417	    native_functions: Sequence[NativeFunction],
1418	) -> Sequence[NativeFunction | NativeFunctionsViewGroup]:
1419	    def maybe_create_view_group(
1420	        d: dict[ViewSchemaKind | SchemaKind, NativeFunction],
1421	    ) -> list[NativeFunction | NativeFunctionsViewGroup]:
1422	        funcs: list[NativeFunction | NativeFunctionsViewGroup] = []
1423	        if ViewSchemaKind.aliasing in d:
1424	            view = d.pop(ViewSchemaKind.aliasing)
1425	            view_inplace = d.pop(ViewSchemaKind.aliasing_inplace, None)
1426	            view_copy = d.pop(SchemaKind.functional, None)
1427	
1428	            funcs.append(
1429	                NativeFunctionsViewGroup(
1430	                    view=view,
1431	                    view_copy=view_copy,
1432	                    view_inplace=view_inplace,
1433	                )
1434	            )
1435	        # Take the remaining functions that weren't part of the view group
1436	        # and emit them separately
1437	        funcs.extend(d.values())
1438	        return funcs
1439	
1440	    grouped_by_views: dict[
1441	        FunctionSchema, dict[SchemaKind | ViewSchemaKind, NativeFunction]
1442	    ] = defaultdict(dict)
1443	    for f in native_functions:
1444	        schema = f.func.view_signature()
1445	        view_kind: ViewSchemaKind = f.view_schema_kind
1446	        # We need to group up ops relevant to the same "view", consisting of:
1447	        # view op (ViewSchemaKind.aliasing)
1448	        # view_inplace op (ViewSchemaKind.aliasing_inplace)
1449	        # view_copy op (SchemaKind.functional)
1450	        if view_kind == ViewSchemaKind.non_aliasing:
1451	            kind = f.func.kind()
1452	            if kind in grouped_by_views[schema]:
1453	                raise AssertionError(
1454	                    f"Duplicate schema kind {kind} in {grouped_by_views[schema].keys()}"
1455	                )
1456	            grouped_by_views[schema][kind] = f
1457	        else:
1458	            if view_kind in grouped_by_views[schema]:
1459	                raise AssertionError(
1460	                    f"{view_kind} already in {grouped_by_views[schema].keys()}"
1461	                )
1462	            grouped_by_views[schema][view_kind] = f
1463	
1464	    return list(concatMap(maybe_create_view_group, grouped_by_views.values()))
1465	
1466	
1467	def get_grouped_native_functions(
1468	    native_functions: Sequence[NativeFunction],
1469	) -> Sequence[NativeFunction | NativeFunctionsGroup]:
1470	    def flatten_pre_group(
1471	        d: dict[SchemaKind, NativeFunction],
1472	    ) -> Sequence[NativeFunction | NativeFunctionsGroup]:
1473	        r = NativeFunctionsGroup.from_dict(d)
1474	        if r is None:
1475	            # Invariant: any NativeFunctions that are code-generated
1476	            # should have been grouped into NativeFunctionsGroup objects
1477	            if any("generated" in f.tags for f in d.values()):
1478	                raise AssertionError(
1479	                    "Generated NativeFunctions should have been grouped into "
1480	                    f"NativeFunctionsGroup objects: {list(d.values())}"
1481	                )
1482	            return list(d.values())
1483	        else:
1484	            return [r]
1485	
1486	    # TODO: how come ValuesView isn't a Sequence lol
1487	    pre_grouped_native_functions = pre_group_native_functions(native_functions)
1488	    return list(
1489	        concatMap(flatten_pre_group, list(pre_grouped_native_functions.values()))
1490	    )

1493	def get_ns_grouped_kernels(
1494	    *,
1495	    grouped_native_functions: Sequence[NativeFunction | NativeFunctionsGroup],
1496	    backend_indices: dict[DispatchKey, BackendIndex],
1497	    native_function_decl_gen: Callable[
1498	        [NativeFunctionsGroup | NativeFunction, BackendIndex], list[str]
1499	    ] = dest.compute_native_function_declaration,
1500	) -> dict[str, list[str]]:
1501	    ns_grouped_kernels: dict[str, list[str]] = defaultdict(list)
1502	    for f in grouped_native_functions:
1503	        native_function_namespaces = set()
1504	        dispatch_keys = set()
1505	        for dispatch_key, backend_idx in backend_indices.items():
1506	            backend_metadata = backend_idx.get_kernel(f)
1507	            if backend_metadata:
1508	                namespace = backend_metadata.cpp_namespace
1509	                dispatch_keys.add(dispatch_key)
1510	                native_function_namespaces.add(namespace)
1511	            else:
1512	                namespace = DEFAULT_KERNEL_NAMESPACE
1513	            if len(native_function_namespaces) > 1:
1514	                raise AssertionError(
1515	                    f"Codegen only supports one namespace per operator, "
1516	                    f"got {native_function_namespaces} from {dispatch_keys}"
1517	                )
1518	            ns_grouped_kernels[namespace].extend(
1519	                native_function_decl_gen(f, backend_idx)
1520	            )
1521	    return ns_grouped_kernels
1522

1524	def get_native_function_declarations_from_ns_grouped_kernels(
1525	    *,
1526	    ns_grouped_kernels: dict[str, list[str]],
1527	) -> list[str]:
1528	    declarations: list[str] = []
1529	    newline = "\n"
1530	    for namespace, kernels in ns_grouped_kernels.items():
1531	        ns_helper = NamespaceHelper(
1532	            namespace_str=namespace,
1533	            entity_name="",
1534	            max_level=4,
1535	        )
1536	        # Convert to a set first to remove duplicate kernel names. Backends are
1537	        # allowed to repeat kernel names; only generate the declaration once!
1538	        ordered_kernels = list(OrderedDict.fromkeys(kernels))
1539	        declarations.extend(
1540	            f"""
1541	{ns_helper.prologue}
1542	{newline.join(ordered_kernels)}
1543	{ns_helper.epilogue}
1544	        """.split(newline)
1545	        )
1546	    return declarations
1547

1549	# Return native function declarations grouped by their namespaces.
1550	def get_native_function_declarations(
1551	    *,
1552	    grouped_native_functions: Sequence[NativeFunction | NativeFunctionsGroup],
1553	    backend_indices: dict[DispatchKey, BackendIndex],
1554	    native_function_decl_gen: Callable[
1555	        [NativeFunctionsGroup | NativeFunction, BackendIndex], list[str]
1556	    ] = dest.compute_native_function_declaration,
1557	) -> list[str]:
1558	    """
1559	    Generate kernel declarations, in `NativeFunction(s).h`.
1560	    :param grouped_native_functions: a sequence of `NativeFunction` or `NativeFunctionGroup`.
1561	    :param backend_indices: kernel collections grouped by dispatch key.
1562	    :param native_function_decl_gen: callable to generate kernel declaration for each `NativeFunction`.
1563	    :return: a list of string, from the string with all declarations, grouped by namespaces, split by newline.
1564	    """
1565	
1566	    ns_grouped_kernels = get_ns_grouped_kernels(
1567	        grouped_native_functions=grouped_native_functions,
1568	        backend_indices=backend_indices,
1569	        native_function_decl_gen=native_function_decl_gen,
1570	    )
1571	    return get_native_function_declarations_from_ns_grouped_kernels(
1572	        ns_grouped_kernels=ns_grouped_kernels
1573	    )

1576	def get_kernel_namespace(
1577	    *, f: NativeFunction | NativeFunctionsGroup, backend_idx: BackendIndex
1578	) -> str:
1579	    backend_metadata = backend_idx.get_kernel(f)
1580	    if backend_metadata and "::native" not in backend_metadata.cpp_namespace:
1581	        func_name = (
1582	            f.func.name if isinstance(f, NativeFunction) else f.functional.func.name
1583	        )
1584	        raise AssertionError(
1585	            f"The kernel for function {func_name} "
1586	            f"with dispatch key {backend_idx.dispatch_key} "
1587	            f"has a namespace {backend_metadata.cpp_namespace} and it's not ending with '::native'."
1588	        )
1589	    return (
1590	        backend_metadata.cpp_namespace if backend_metadata else DEFAULT_KERNEL_NAMESPACE
1591	    )

1594	# Return native function definitions grouped by dispatch key and custom namespace.
1595	# Used in RegisterDispatchKey.cpp and etc.
1596	def get_native_function_definitions(
1597	    *,
1598	    fm: FileManager,
1599	    grouped_native_functions: Sequence[NativeFunction | NativeFunctionsGroup],
1600	    dispatch_key: DispatchKey,
1601	    backend_idx: BackendIndex,
1602	    selector: SelectiveBuilder,
1603	    rocm: bool,
1604	    symint: bool,
1605	    skip_dispatcher_op_registration: bool,
1606	    gen_dispatch_helpers: bool,
1607	) -> list[str]:
1608	    definitions: list[str] = []
1609	    ns_definitions: dict[str, list[str]] = defaultdict(list)
1610	    anonymous_definitions: dict[str, list[str]] = defaultdict(list)
1611	    registrations: dict[str, dict[str, list[str]]] = defaultdict(dict)
1612	    newline = "\n"
1613	    ns_gen = dest.RegisterDispatchKey(
1614	        backend_idx,
1615	        Target.NAMESPACED_DEFINITION,
1616	        selector,
1617	        rocm=rocm,
1618	        symint=symint,
1619	        class_method_name=None,
1620	        skip_dispatcher_op_registration=skip_dispatcher_op_registration,
1621	    )
1622	    anonymous_gen = dest.RegisterDispatchKey(
1623	        backend_idx,
1624	        Target.ANONYMOUS_DEFINITION,
1625	        selector,
1626	        rocm=rocm,
1627	        symint=symint,
1628	        class_method_name=None,
1629	        skip_dispatcher_op_registration=skip_dispatcher_op_registration,
1630	    )
1631	    reg_gen = dest.RegisterDispatchKey(
1632	        backend_idx,
1633	        Target.REGISTRATION,
1634	        selector,
1635	        rocm=rocm,
1636	        symint=symint,
1637	        class_method_name=None,
1638	        skip_dispatcher_op_registration=skip_dispatcher_op_registration,
1639	    )
1640	    for f in grouped_native_functions:
1641	        kernel_namespace = get_kernel_namespace(f=f, backend_idx=backend_idx).replace(
1642	            "::native", ""
1643	        )
1644	
1645	        ns_definitions[kernel_namespace].extend(
1646	            ns_gen(f),
1647	        )
1648	        anonymous_definitions[kernel_namespace].extend(
1649	            anonymous_gen(f),
1650	        )
1651	        namespace = (
1652	            f.namespace if isinstance(f, NativeFunction) else f.functional.namespace
1653	        )
1654	        if namespace not in registrations[kernel_namespace]:
1655	            registrations[kernel_namespace] = defaultdict(list)
1656	        registrations[kernel_namespace][namespace].extend(
1657	            reg_gen(f),
1658	        )
1659	
1660	    for kernel_namespace in ns_definitions:
1661	        if len(ns_definitions[kernel_namespace]) == 0:
1662	            continue
1663	        ns_helper = NamespaceHelper(namespace_str=kernel_namespace)
1664	        registration_body = ""
1665	        for namespace in registrations[kernel_namespace]:
1666	            if not registrations[kernel_namespace][namespace]:
1667	                continue
1668	            registration_body += f"""
1669	TORCH_LIBRARY_IMPL({namespace}, {dispatch_key}, m) {{
1670	    {newline.join(registrations[kernel_namespace][namespace])}
1671	}}"""
1672	        definitions.extend(
1673	            fm.substitute_with_template(
1674	                "RegisterDispatchDefinitions.ini",
1675	                lambda: {
1676	                    "ns_prologue": ns_helper.prologue,
1677	                    "ns_epilogue": ns_helper.epilogue,
1678	                    "dispatch_anonymous_definitions": anonymous_definitions[
1679	                        kernel_namespace
1680	                    ],
1681	                    "static_init_dispatch_registrations": ""
1682	                    if skip_dispatcher_op_registration
1683	                    else registration_body,
1684	                    "deferred_dispatch_registrations": "",
1685	                    "dispatch_namespace": dispatch_key.lower(),
1686	                    "dispatch_namespaced_definitions": ns_definitions[kernel_namespace],
1687	                },
1688	            ).split(newline)
1689	        )
1690	
1691	    return definitions
1692

1694	# Return native function declarations grouped by dispatch key and custom namespace.
1695	# Used in CPUFunctions_inl.h and etc.
1696	def get_namespaced_declaration(
1697	    *,
1698	    grouped_native_functions: Sequence[NativeFunction | NativeFunctionsGroup],
1699	    dispatch_key: DispatchKey,
1700	    backend_idx: BackendIndex,
1701	    selector: SelectiveBuilder,
1702	    rocm: bool,
1703	    symint: bool,
1704	) -> list[str]:
1705	    declarations: list[str] = []
1706	    ns_grouped_kernels: dict[str, list[str]] = defaultdict(list)
1707	    newline = "\n"
1708	    func = dest.RegisterDispatchKey(
1709	        backend_idx,
1710	        Target.NAMESPACED_DECLARATION,
1711	        selector,
1712	        rocm=rocm,
1713	        class_method_name=None,
1714	        skip_dispatcher_op_registration=False,
1715	        symint=symint,
1716	    )
1717	    for f in grouped_native_functions:
1718	        namespace = get_kernel_namespace(f=f, backend_idx=backend_idx).replace(
1719	            "native", dispatch_key.lower()
1720	        )
1721	
1722	        ns_grouped_kernels[namespace].extend(
1723	            func(f),
1724	        )
1725	
1726	    for namespace, kernels in ns_grouped_kernels.items():
1727	        if len(kernels) == 0:
1728	            continue
1729	        ns_helper = NamespaceHelper(
1730	            namespace_str=namespace, entity_name="", max_level=3
1731	        )
1732	        ordered_kernels = list(OrderedDict.fromkeys(kernels))
1733	        declarations.extend(
1734	            f"""
1735	{ns_helper.prologue}
1736	{newline.join(ordered_kernels)}
1737	{ns_helper.epilogue}
1738	        """.split(newline)
1739	        )
1740	    return declarations

1743	# Return native function schema registration code for aten and other namespaces.
1744	def get_native_function_schema_registrations(
1745	    *,
1746	    native_functions: Sequence[NativeFunction],
1747	    schema_selector: SelectiveBuilder,
1748	) -> tuple[list[str], str]:
1749	    ns_native_functions: dict[str, list[NativeFunction]] = defaultdict(list)
1750	    for native_function in native_functions:
1751	        ns_native_functions[native_function.namespace].append(native_function)
1752	    schema_registrations = ""
1753	    aten_schema_registrations = []
1754	    custom_namespace = None
1755	    for namespace, funcs in ns_native_functions.items():
1756	        schema_registrations_body = list(
1757	            mapMaybe(RegisterSchema(schema_selector), funcs)
1758	        )
1759	        # NB: we have to separate aten namespace registration from other namespaces,
1760	        # because in the template we hardcoded an operator for ATen already.
1761	        if namespace == "aten":
1762	            aten_schema_registrations = schema_registrations_body
1763	        else:
1764	            custom_namespace = namespace
1765	            tab = "\t"
1766	            # if the namespace is predefined, we should use define a library fragment
1767	            # instead of a new library
1768	            torch_library_macro = (
1769	                "TORCH_LIBRARY_FRAGMENT"
1770	                if namespace in FRAGMENT_NAMESPACES
1771	                else "TORCH_LIBRARY"
1772	            )
1773	            schema_registrations += f"""
1774	{torch_library_macro}({custom_namespace}, m) {{
1775	  {tab.join(schema_registrations_body)}
1776	}};"""
1777	    return (aten_schema_registrations, schema_registrations)
1778

1780	def gen_aggregated_headers(
1781	    *,
1782	    native_functions: Sequence[NativeFunction],
1783	    grouped_native_functions: Sequence[NativeFunction | NativeFunctionsGroup],
1784	    structured_native_functions: Sequence[NativeFunctionsGroup],
1785	    static_dispatch_idx: list[BackendIndex],
1786	    selector: SelectiveBuilder,
1787	    backend_indices: dict[DispatchKey, BackendIndex],
1788	    cpu_fm: FileManager,
1789	    device_fms: dict[str, FileManager],
1790	    functions_keys: set[DispatchKey],
1791	    dispatch_keys: Sequence[DispatchKey],
1792	    rocm: bool,
1793	) -> None:
1794	    # Buck doesn't support dynamic output files, so we aggregate all operator
1795	    # headers into a single file
1796	    cpu_fm.write(
1797	        "NativeMetaFunctions.h",
1798	        lambda: {
1799	            "NativeMetaFunctions_includes": [],
1800	            "NativeMetaFunctions_declarations": list(
1801	                mapMaybe(compute_meta_function_declaration, structured_native_functions)
1802	            ),
1803	        },
1804	    )
1805	    method_native_functions = [
1806	        fn for fn in native_functions if Variant.method in fn.variants
1807	    ]
1808	    non_method_native_functions = [
1809	        fn for fn in native_functions if fn not in method_native_functions
1810	    ]
1811	    cpu_fm.write(
1812	        "MethodOperators.h",
1813	        lambda: {
1814	            "MethodOperators_includes": [],
1815	            "MethodOperators_declarations": list(
1816	                mapMaybe(
1817	                    ComputeOperators(
1818	                        Target.DECLARATION,
1819	                        static_dispatch_backend_indices=static_dispatch_idx,
1820	                    ),
1821	                    method_native_functions,
1822	                )
1823	            ),
1824	        },
1825	    )
1826	    cpu_fm.write(
1827	        "Operators.h",
1828	        lambda: {
1829	            "Operators_includes": ["#include <ATen/MethodOperators.h>"],
1830	            "Operators_declarations": list(
1831	                mapMaybe(
1832	                    ComputeOperators(
1833	                        Target.DECLARATION,
1834	                        static_dispatch_backend_indices=static_dispatch_idx,
1835	                    ),
1836	                    non_method_native_functions,
1837	                )
1838	            ),
1839	        },
1840	    )
1841	    cpu_fm.write(
1842	        "Functions.h",
1843	        lambda: {
1844	            "static_dispatch_extra_headers": static_dispatch_extra_headers(
1845	                static_dispatch_idx
1846	            ),
1847	            "Functions_includes": ["#include <ATen/Operators.h>"],
1848	            "Functions_declarations": list(
1849	                mapMaybe(
1850	                    ComputeFunction(),
1851	                    native_functions,
1852	                )
1853	            ),
1854	        },
1855	    )
1856	    declarations = get_native_function_declarations(
1857	        grouped_native_functions=grouped_native_functions,
1858	        backend_indices=backend_indices,
1859	    )
1860	    cpu_fm.write(
1861	        "NativeFunctions.h",
1862	        lambda: {
1863	            "NativeFunctions_includes": ["#include <ATen/NativeMetaFunctions.h>"],
1864	            "NativeFunctions_declarations": declarations,
1865	        },
1866	    )
1867	
1868	    for dispatch_key in dispatch_keys:
1869	        fm = file_manager_from_dispatch_key(dispatch_key, device_fms, cpu_fm)
1870	        if dispatch_key in functions_keys:
1871	            inl_headers = f"#include <ATen/{dispatch_key}Functions_inl.h>"
1872	
1873	            fm.write_with_template(
1874	                f"{dispatch_key}Functions.h",
1875	                "DispatchKeyFunctions.h",
1876	                lambda: {
1877	                    "dispatch_key": str(dispatch_key),
1878	                    "inline_headers": inl_headers,
1879	                },
1880	            )
1881	            fm.write_with_template(

1901	def gen_per_operator_headers(
1902	    *,
1903	    native_functions: Sequence[NativeFunction],
1904	    grouped_native_functions: Sequence[NativeFunction | NativeFunctionsGroup],
1905	    static_dispatch_idx: list[BackendIndex],
1906	    selector: SelectiveBuilder,
1907	    backend_indices: dict[DispatchKey, BackendIndex],
1908	    cpu_fm: FileManager,
1909	    device_fms: dict[str, FileManager],
1910	    ops_fm: FileManager,
1911	    functions_keys: set[DispatchKey],
1912	    dispatch_keys: Sequence[DispatchKey],
1913	    rocm: bool,
1914	) -> None:
1915	    # For CMake builds, split operator declarations into separate headers in
1916	    # the ATen/ops folder to split up header dependencies
1917	    functions_by_root_name: dict[str, list[NativeFunction]] = defaultdict(list)
1918	    for fn in native_functions:
1919	        functions_by_root_name[fn.root_name].append(fn)
1920	
1921	    grouped_functions_by_root_name: dict[
1922	        str, list[NativeFunction | NativeFunctionsGroup]
1923	    ] = defaultdict(list)
1924	    for group in grouped_native_functions:
1925	        name = group.root_name
1926	        grouped_functions_by_root_name[name].append(group)
1927	
1928	    for name, functions in functions_by_root_name.items():
1929	        ops_fm.write_with_template(
1930	            f"{name}_ops.h",
1931	            "Operator.h",
1932	            lambda: {
1933	                "declarations": list(
1934	                    mapMaybe(
1935	                        ComputeOperators(
1936	                            Target.DECLARATION,
1937	                            static_dispatch_backend_indices=static_dispatch_idx,
1938	                        ),
1939	                        functions,
1940	                    )
1941	                ),
1942	            },
1943	        )
1944	
1945	        ops_fm.write_with_template(
1946	            f"{name}.h",
1947	            "Function.h",
1948	            lambda: {
1949	                "static_dispatch_ops_headers": list(
1950	                    mapMaybe(
1951	                        lambda fn: static_dispatch_ops_header(
1952	                            fn, backend_index=static_dispatch_idx
1953	                        ),
1954	                        functions,
1955	                    )
1956	                ),
1957	                "operator_includes": f"#include <ATen/ops/{name}_ops.h>",
1958	                "function_definitions": list(
1959	                    mapMaybe(
1960	                        ComputeFunction(),
1961	                        functions,
1962	                    )
1963	                ),
1964	            },
1965	        )
1966	
1967	        grouped_functions = grouped_functions_by_root_name.get(name, [])
1968	        structured_functions = [
1969	            fn
1970	            for fn in grouped_functions
1971	            if isinstance(fn, NativeFunctionsGroup) and fn.structured
1972	        ]
1973	        is_structured = len(structured_functions) > 0
1974	
1975	        if is_structured:
1976	            ops_fm.write_with_template(
1977	                f"{name}_meta.h",
1978	                "NativeMetaFunction.h",
1979	                lambda: {
1980	                    "meta_function_declarations": list(
1981	                        mapMaybe(
1982	                            compute_meta_function_declaration, structured_functions
1983	                        )
1984	                    ),
1985	                },
1986	            )
1987	        declarations = get_native_function_declarations(
1988	            grouped_native_functions=grouped_functions,
1989	            backend_indices=backend_indices,
1990	            native_function_decl_gen=dest.compute_native_function_declaration,
1991	        )
1992	        ops_fm.write_with_template(
1993	            f"{name}_native.h",
1994	            "NativeFunction.h",
1995	            lambda: {
1996	                "extra_includes": (
1997	                    f"#include <ATen/ops/{name}_meta.h>" if is_structured else []
1998	                ),
1999	                "native_function_declarations": declarations,
2000	            },
2001	        )
2002	
2003	    for category, suffix in [
2004	        ("Functions", ""),
2005	        ("Operators", "_ops"),
2006	        ("NativeMetaFunctions", "_meta"),
2007	        ("NativeFunctions", "_native"),
2008	    ]:
2009	        cpu_fm.write(
2010	            f"{category}.h",
2011	            lambda: {
2012	                f"{category}_includes": [
2013	                    f"#include <ATen/ops/{name}{suffix}.h>"
2014	                    for name in sorted(functions_by_root_name.keys())
2015	                ],
2016	                f"{category}_declarations": [],
2017	            },
2018	        )
2019	
2020	    for dispatch_key in dispatch_keys:
2021	        if dispatch_key not in functions_keys:
2022	            continue
2023	
2024	        dispatch_namespace = dispatch_key.lower()
2025	        dispatch_names = []
2026	
2027	        for name, functions in functions_by_root_name.items():
2028	            grouped_functions = grouped_functions_by_root_name.get(name, [])
2029	            declarations = list(
2030	                concatMap(
2031	                    dest.RegisterDispatchKey(
2032	                        backend_indices[dispatch_key],
2033	                        Target.NAMESPACED_DECLARATION,
2034	                        selector,
2035	                        rocm=rocm,
2036	                        symint=True,
2037	                        class_method_name=None,
2038	                        skip_dispatcher_op_registration=False,
2039	                    ),
2040	                    grouped_functions,
2041	                )
2042	            )
2043	
2044	            if len(declarations) == 0:
2045	                continue
2046	
2047	            dispatch_names.append(name)
2048	            ops_fm.write_with_template(
2049	                f"{name}_{dispatch_namespace}_dispatch.h",
2050	                "DispatchKeyFunction.h",
2051	                lambda: {
2052	                    "dispatch_namespace": dispatch_namespace,
2053	                    "dispatch_namespaced_declarations": declarations,
2054	                },
2055	            )
2056	
2057	        fm = file_manager_from_dispatch_key(dispatch_key, device_fms, cpu_fm)
2058	        inl_headers = f"#include <ATen/{dispatch_key}Functions_inl.h>"
2059	
2060	        fm.write_with_template(
2061	            f"{dispatch_key}Functions.h",
2062	            "DispatchKeyFunctions.h",
2063	            lambda: {
2064	                "dispatch_key": str(dispatch_key),
2065	                "inline_headers": inl_headers,
2066	            },
2067	        )
2068	        fm.write_with_template(
2069	            f"{dispatch_key}Functions_inl.h",
2070	            "DispatchKeyFunctions_inl.h",
2071	            lambda: {
2072	                "dispatch_namespace": dispatch_namespace,
2073	                "DispatchKeyFunctions_inl_includes": [
2074	                    f"#include <ATen/ops/{name}_{dispatch_namespace}_dispatch.h>"
2075	                    for name in sorted(dispatch_names)
2076	                ],
2077	                "dispatch_namespaced_declarations": [],
2078	            },
2079	        )
2080	        del fm
2081	
2082	    cpu_fm.write(
2083	        "MethodOperators.h",
2084	        lambda: {
2085	            "MethodOperators_includes": sorted(
2086	                f"#include <ATen/ops/{name}_ops.h>"
2087	                for name, functions in functions_by_root_name.items()
2088	                if any(Variant.method in fn.variants for fn in functions)
2089	            ),
2090	            "MethodOperators_declarations": [],
2091	        },
2092	    )
2093

2190	    def gen_aten_interned_strings() -> dict[str, str]:
2191	        attrs: set[str] = set()  # All function argument names
2192	        names = set()  # All ATen function names
2193	        for func in native_functions:
2194	            names.add(str(func.func.name.name))
2195	            # Some operators don't have a functional variant but we still create a
2196	            # symbol without the underscore
2197	            names.add(func.func.name.name.base)
2198	
2199	            attrs.update(arg.name for arg in func.func.schema_order_arguments())
2200	
2201	        # These are keywords in C++, so aren't valid symbol names
2202	        # https://en.cppreference.com/w/cpp/language/operator_alternative
2203	        names -= {
2204	            "and",
2205	            "and_eq",
2206	            "bitand",
2207	            "bitor",
2208	            "compl",
2209	            "not",
2210	            "not_eq",
2211	            "or",
2212	            "or_eq",
2213	            "xor",
2214	            "xor_eq",
2215	        }
2216	
2217	        return {
2218	            "aten_symbols": " \\\n".join(
2219	                [f"_(aten, {name})" for name in sorted(names)]
2220	            ),
2221	            "attr_symbols": " \\\n".join(
2222	                [f"_(attr, {name})" for name in sorted(attrs)]
2223	            ),
2224	        }
2225	
2226	    core_fm.write("aten_interned_strings.h", gen_aten_interned_strings)
2227	
2228	    def gen_tags_enum() -> dict[str, str]:
2229	        return {"enum_of_valid_tags": (",\n".join(sorted(valid_tags)))}
2230	
2231	    headeronly_fm.write("enum_tag.h", gen_tags_enum)

2234	def gen_source_files(
2235	    *,
2236	    native_functions: Sequence[NativeFunction],
2237	    grouped_native_functions: Sequence[NativeFunction | NativeFunctionsGroup],
2238	    structured_native_functions: Sequence[NativeFunctionsGroup],
2239	    view_groups: Sequence[NativeFunctionsViewGroup],
2240	    selector: SelectiveBuilder,
2241	    static_dispatch_idx: list[BackendIndex],
2242	    backend_indices: dict[DispatchKey, BackendIndex],
2243	    aoti_fm: FileManager,
2244	    core_fm: FileManager,
2245	    cpu_vec_fm: FileManager,
2246	    cpu_fm: FileManager,
2247	    device_fms: dict[str, FileManager],
2248	    dispatch_keys: Sequence[DispatchKey],
2249	    functions_keys: set[DispatchKey],
2250	    rocm: bool,
2251	    force_schema_registration: bool,
2252	    per_operator_headers: bool,
2253	    skip_dispatcher_op_registration: bool,
2254	    update_aoti_c_shim: bool,
2255	    aoti_backends: set[DispatchKey | None],
2256	    extend_aoti_c_shim: bool,
2257	) -> None:
2258	    extra_cuda_headers = """\
2259	#include <c10/cuda/CUDAGuard.h>
2260	#include <ATen/cuda/ATenCUDAGeneral.h>
2261	#include <ATen/cuda/CUDADevice.h>
2262	#include <ATen/cuda/CUDAContext.h>"""
2263	    if rocm:
2264	        extra_cuda_headers = """\
2265	#include <c10/hip/HIPGuard.h>
2266	#include <ATen/hip/ATenHIPGeneral.h>
2267	#include <ATen/hip/HIPDevice.h>
2268	#include <ATen/hip/HIPContext.h>"""
2269	
2270	    for dispatch_key in dispatch_keys:
2271	        fm = file_manager_from_dispatch_key(dispatch_key, device_fms, cpu_fm)
2272	        if per_operator_headers:
2273	
2274	            def operator_headers() -> list[str]:
2275	                headers = []
2276	                for g in grouped_native_functions:
2277	                    is_registered = False
2278	                    if backend_index.has_kernel(g):
2279	                        is_registered = True
2280	                    # The above has_kernel test on a group will only test for
2281	                    # the existence of out dispatch, because that's how
2282	                    # structured kernels work. But sometimes functions can be
2283	                    # grouped but not be structured, and then you need to check
2284	                    # each individual piece, as they may have manual dispatch
2285	                    # entries.
2286	                    elif isinstance(g, NativeFunctionsGroup) and any(
2287	                        backend_index.has_kernel(fn) for fn in g.functions()
2288	                    ):
2289	                        is_registered = True
2290	                    # TODO: this condition is a bit questionable
2291	                    # (It has to do with the fact that structured kernels get generated kernels
2292	                    # to the Meta + CompositeExplicitAutogradNonFunctional keys).
2293	                    elif g.structured and dispatch_key in (
2294	                        DispatchKey.Meta,
2295	                        DispatchKey.CompositeExplicitAutogradNonFunctional,
2296	                    ):
2297	                        is_registered = True
2298	                    if not is_registered:
2299	                        continue
2300	
2301	                    headers.append(f"#include <ATen/ops/{g.root_name}_native.h>")
2302	                    if (
2303	                        dispatch_key
2304	                        == DispatchKey.CompositeExplicitAutogradNonFunctional
2305	                    ):
2306	                        headers.append(f"#include <ATen/ops/{g.root_name}.h>")
2307	                    if dispatch_key in functions_keys:
2308	                        headers.append(
2309	                            f"#include <ATen/ops/{g.root_name}_{dispatch_namespace}_dispatch.h>"
2310	                        )
2311	
2312	                return sorted(set(headers))
2313	
2314	        else:
2315	
2316	            def operator_headers() -> list[str]:
2317	                headers = ["#include <ATen/NativeFunctions.h>"]
2318	                if dispatch_key == DispatchKey.CompositeExplicitAutogradNonFunctional:
2319	                    headers.append("#include <ATen/Functions.h>")
2320	                if dispatch_key in functions_keys:
2321	                    headers.append(f"#include <ATen/{dispatch_key!s}Functions.h>")
2322	                return headers
2323	
2324	        backend_index = backend_indices[dispatch_key]
2325	        ns_grouped_native_functions = defaultdict(list)
2326	        for grouped_native_function in grouped_native_functions:
2327	            namespace = (
2328	                grouped_native_function.namespace
2329	                if isinstance(grouped_native_function, NativeFunction)
2330	                else grouped_native_function.functional.namespace
2331	            )
2332	            ns_grouped_native_functions[namespace].append(grouped_native_function)
2333	
2334	        dispatch_namespace = str(dispatch_key).lower()
2335	
2336	        # CompositeImplicitAutogradNestdTensor does not currently user the helpers generated
2337	        # compilation will fail when `-Werror=unused-function` flag is set
2338	        gen_dispatch_helpers: bool = (
2339	            dispatch_key != DispatchKey.CompositeImplicitAutogradNestedTensor
2340	        )
2341	
2342	        register_dispatch_key_base_env = {
2343	            "extra_cuda_headers": extra_cuda_headers
2344	            if is_cuda_dispatch_key(dispatch_key)
2345	            else "",
2346	            "external_backend_headers": "",
2347	            "dispatch_headers": dest.gen_registration_headers(
2348	                backend_index, per_operator_headers, rocm
2349	            ),
2350	            # ops_headers *could* be sharded, but doesn't seem necessary?
2351	            "ops_headers": operator_headers(),
2352	            "dispatch_helpers": (
2353	                dest.gen_registration_helpers(backend_index)
2354	                if gen_dispatch_helpers
2355	                else []
2356	            ),
2357	        }
2358	
2359	        def register_dispatch_key_env_callable(
2360	            gnf: NativeFunction | NativeFunctionsGroup,
2361	        ) -> dict[str, list[str]]:
2362	            return {
2363	                "dispatch_definitions": get_native_function_definitions(
2364	                    fm=fm,  # noqa: F821
2365	                    grouped_native_functions=[gnf],
2366	                    dispatch_key=dispatch_key,
2367	                    backend_idx=backend_index,
2368	                    selector=selector,
2369	                    rocm=rocm,
2370	                    symint=True,
2371	                    skip_dispatcher_op_registration=skip_dispatcher_op_registration,
2372	                    gen_dispatch_helpers=gen_dispatch_helpers,
2373	                )
2374	            }
2375	
2376	        fm.write_sharded_with_template(
2377	            f"Register{dispatch_key}.cpp",
2378	            "RegisterDispatchKey.cpp",
2379	            grouped_native_functions,
2380	            key_fn=lambda x: x.root_name,
2381	            env_callable=register_dispatch_key_env_callable,
2382	            num_shards=4 if dispatch_key == DispatchKey.CPU else 1,
2383	            base_env=register_dispatch_key_base_env,
2384	            sharded_keys={"dispatch_definitions"},
2385	        )
2386	
2387	        for g in structured_native_functions:
2388	            if not g.out.ufunc_inner_loop or not is_ufunc_dispatch_key(dispatch_key):
2389	                continue
2390	            name = g.functional.func.name.name
2391	            if dispatch_key is DispatchKey.CPU:
2392	                if fm is not cpu_fm:
2393	                    raise AssertionError("Expected fm to be cpu_fm for DispatchKey.CPU")
2394	                fm.write_with_template(
2395	                    f"UfuncCPU_{name}.cpp",
2396	                    "UfuncCPU.cpp",
2397	                    lambda: {
2398	                        "meta_declaration": compute_meta_function_declaration(g),
2399	                        "native_declaration": dest.compute_native_function_declaration(
2400	                            g, backend_indices[dispatch_key]
2401	                        ),
2402	                        "native_definitions": dest.compute_ufunc_cpu(g),
2403	                    },
2404	                )
2405	                cpu_vec_fm.write_with_template(
2406	                    f"UfuncCPUKernel_{name}.cpp",
2407	                    "UfuncCPUKernel.cpp",
2408	                    lambda: {
2409	                        "name": name,
2410	                        "native_definitions": dest.compute_ufunc_cpu_kernel(g),
2411	                    },
2412	                )
2413	            elif dispatch_key is DispatchKey.CUDA:
2414	                cuda_headers = "#include <ATen/native/cuda/Loops.cuh>"
2415	                if rocm:
2416	                    cuda_headers = "#include <ATen/native/hip/Loops.cuh>"
2417	                fm.write_with_template(
2418	                    f"UfuncCUDA_{name}.cu",
2419	                    "UfuncCUDA.cu",
2420	                    lambda: {
2421	                        "name": name,
2422	                        "cuda_headers": cuda_headers,
2423	                        "meta_declaration": compute_meta_function_declaration(g),
2424	                        "native_declaration": dest.compute_native_function_declaration(
2425	                            g, backend_indices[dispatch_key]
2426	                        ),
2427	                        "native_definitions": dest.compute_ufunc_cuda(g),
2428	                    },
2429	                )
2430	            else:
2431	                raise AssertionError(f"unrecognized {dispatch_key} for ufunc")
2432	
2433	        del fm
2434	
2435	    gen_aoti_c_shim_files(
2436	        aoti_fm=aoti_fm,
2437	        aoti_backends=aoti_backends,
2438	        native_functions=native_functions,
2439	        backend_indices=backend_indices,
2440	        structured_native_functions=structured_native_functions,
2441	        extra_cuda_headers=extra_cuda_headers,
2442	        update_aoti_c_shim=update_aoti_c_shim,
2443	        extend_aoti_c_shim=extend_aoti_c_shim,
2444	    )
2445	
2446	    # BackendSelect is generated specially
2447	    def gen_backend_select() -> dict[str, list[str]]:

2450	        ]

2468	
2469	    schema_selector = selector

2471	        schema_selector = SelectiveBuilder.get_nop_selector()
2472	
2473	    (
2474	        aten_schema_registrations,

2478	    )
2479	    cpu_fm.write(

2481	        lambda: {
2482	            "aten_schema_registrations": []
2483	            if skip_dispatcher_op_registration
2484	            else aten_schema_registrations,
2485	            "schema_registrations": []
2486	            if skip_dispatcher_op_registration
2487	            else schema_registrations,
2488	        },
2489	    )

2491	    def key_func(
2492	        fn: NativeFunction | NativeFunctionsGroup | NativeFunctionsViewGroup,

2496	    cpu_fm.write_sharded(
2497	        "Operators.cpp",
2498	        native_functions,
2499	        key_fn=key_func,
2500	        env_callable=lambda fn: {
2501	            "operator_headers": [f"#include <ATen/ops/{fn.root_name}.h>"],

2506	                )(fn)

2508	        },

2510	            "static_dispatch_extra_headers": static_dispatch_extra_headers(

2512	            ),
2513	        },
2514	        num_shards=5,
2515	        sharded_keys={
2516	            "operator_headers",
2517	            "definitions",
2518	            "static_dispatch_extra_headers",

2533	    def gen_op_headers(
2534	        g: NativeFunction | NativeFunctionsGroup | NativeFunctionsViewGroup,
2535	    ) -> list[str]:
2536	        if isinstance(g, NativeFunctionsViewGroup):
2537	            # view ops always get a functionalization kernel
2538	            headers = [
2539	                f"#include <ATen/ops/{g.view.root_name}_native.h>",
2540	                f"#include <ATen/ops/{g.view.root_name}_ops.h>",
2541	            ]
2542	            if g.view_copy is not None:
2543	                headers += [
2544	                    f"#include <ATen/ops/{g.view_copy.root_name}_native.h>",
2545	                    f"#include <ATen/ops/{g.view_copy.root_name}_ops.h>",
2546	                ]
2547	            return headers
2548	        elif isinstance(g, NativeFunctionsGroup):
2549	            headers = [
2550	                f"#include <ATen/ops/{g.functional.root_name}_native.h>",
2551	                f"#include <ATen/ops/{g.functional.root_name}_ops.h>",
2552	                f"#include <ATen/ops/{g.out.root_name}_native.h>",
2553	                f"#include <ATen/ops/{g.out.root_name}_ops.h>",
2554	            ]
2555	            if g.inplace is not None:
2556	                headers += [
2557	                    f"#include <ATen/ops/{g.inplace.root_name}_native.h>",
2558	                    f"#include <ATen/ops/{g.inplace.root_name}_ops.h>",
2559	                ]
2560	            if g.mutable is not None:
2561	                headers += [
2562	                    f"#include <ATen/ops/{g.mutable.root_name}_native.h>",
2563	                    f"#include <ATen/ops/{g.mutable.root_name}_ops.h>",
2564	                ]
2565	            return headers
2566	        else:
2567	            return [
2568	                f"#include <ATen/ops/{g.root_name}_native.h>",
2569	                f"#include <ATen/ops/{g.root_name}_ops.h>",
2570	            ]
2571	
2572	    def functionalization_env_callable(
2573	        g: NativeFunction | NativeFunctionsGroup | NativeFunctionsViewGroup,
2574	    ) -> dict[str, list[str]]:
2575	        return {
2576	            "ops_headers": gen_op_headers(g),
2577	            "func_definitions": gen_functionalization_definition(
2578	                selector,
2579	                g,
2580	            ),
2581	            "func_registrations": gen_functionalization_registration(
2582	                selector,
2583	                g,
2584	                backend_indices[DispatchKey.CompositeImplicitAutograd],
2585	            ),
2586	        }
2587	
2588	    all_groups: list[
2589	        NativeFunction | NativeFunctionsGroup | NativeFunctionsViewGroup
2590	    ] = list(structured_native_functions) + list(
2591	        view_groups  # type: ignore[assignment, arg-type, operator]
2592	    )
2593	    # Note: all operators that functionalization needs to handle (mutable and aliasing ops) should be grouped properly.
2594	    # The only reason we really need to deal with direct NativeFunctions here (instead of the groups) is because:
2595	    # (1) We can provide better error checking (error out if someone introduces a mutable op that doesn't obey the grouping logic)
2596	    # (2) functionalization needs to manually register CompositeImplicitAutograd kernels, which might not be grouped.
2597	    #     Although this could go away long-term if we add a dedicated dispatch key for decompositions.
2598	    structured_map: dict[OperatorName, NativeFunction] = {
2599	        f.func.name: f
2600	        for f in concatMap(lambda g: list(g.functions()), structured_native_functions)
2601	    }
2602	    view_map: dict[OperatorName, NativeFunction] = {
2603	        f.func.name: f for f in concatMap(lambda g: list(g.functions()), view_groups)
2604	    }
2605	    all_groups.extend(
2606	        f
2607	        for f in native_functions
2608	        if f.func.name not in structured_map and f.func.name not in view_map
2609	    )
2610	
2611	    cpu_fm.write_sharded(
2612	        "RegisterFunctionalization.cpp",
2613	        all_groups,
2614	        key_fn=key_func,
2615	        env_callable=functionalization_env_callable,
2616	        num_shards=4,
2617	        sharded_keys={
2618	            "ops_headers",
2619	            "func_definitions",
2620	            "func_registrations",
2621	            "func_add_back_views_definitions",
2622	            "func_add_back_views_registrations",
2623	        },
2624	    )
2625	
2626	    cpu_fm.write(
2627	        "FunctionalInverses.h",
2628	        lambda: {
2629	            "view_inverse_declarations": list(
2630	                mapMaybe(
2631	                    lambda g: gen_functionalization_view_inverse_declaration(
2632	                        selector, g
2633	                    ),
2634	                    view_groups,
2635	                )
2636	            )
2637	        },
2638	    )
2639	
2640	    cpu_fm.write(
2641	        "ViewMetaClasses.h",
2642	        lambda: {
2643	            "view_meta_declarations": list(
2644	                concatMap(
2645	                    lambda g: gen_functionalization_view_meta_classes_decl(selector, g),
2646	                    view_groups,
2647	                )
2648	            )
2649	        },
2650	    )
2651	
2652	    cpu_fm.write(
2653	        "ViewMetaClasses.cpp",
2654	        lambda: {
2655	            "view_meta_implementations": list(
2656	                concatMap(
2657	                    lambda g: gen_functionalization_view_meta_classes_impl(selector, g),
2658	                    view_groups,
2659	                )
2660	            ),
2661	            "op_headers": list(concatMap(gen_op_headers, view_groups)),
2662	        },
2663	    )
2664	
2665	    # Note [view_copy NativeFunctions]
2666	    # Every view operator in native_functions.yaml that is not CompositeImplicitAutograd
2667	    # needs to have a corresponding non-aliasing {view}_copy variant.
2668	    # Backends that use functionalization and don't know how to handle aliasing ops
2669	    # are expected to implement kernels for these {view}_copy kernels instead.
2670	    # The code for {view}_copy operators in core is pretty boilerplate-heavy however,
2671	    # so we codegen the following:
2672	    # (1) A CompositeExplicitAutogradNonFunctional kernel for every {view}_copy operator.
2673	    #     These are never explicitly invoked by the functionalization pass,
2674	    #     but they could theoretically be called from user code (I added these kernels for completeness,
2675	    #     since the ops are part of the public API).
2676	    # (2) A derivative formula for every {view}_copy operator
2677	    #     {view}_copy operators can reuse the same derivative formulas as their {view} op counterparts,
2678	    #     so rather than stamping all of the entries out in derivatives.yaml,
2679	    #     we codegen them in.
2680	    #     This is similar to how autograd codegen doesn't require inplace ops to have a derivatives.yaml entry.
2681	    cpu_fm.write(
2682	        "CompositeViewCopyKernels.cpp",
2683	        lambda: {
2684	            "ops_headers": [
2685	                "\n".join(
2686	                    f"#include <ATen/ops/{f.root_name}_ops.h>\n"
2687	                    # NB: this include is important as it ensures we
2688	                    # set the visibility on generated view_copy kernels
2689	                    # correctly
2690	                    f"#include <ATen/ops/{f.root_name}_native.h>"
2691	                    for f in (
2692	                        [g.view] if g.view_copy is None else [g.view, g.view_copy]
2693	                    )
2694	                )
2695	                for g in view_groups
2696	            ]
2697	            + [
2698	                "\n".join(
2699	                    f"#include <ATen/ops/{f.root_name}_ops.h>\n"
2700	                    # NB: this include is also important for correct visibility
2701	                    f"#include <ATen/ops/{f.root_name}_native.h>"
2702	                    for f in [g.inplace, g.mutable, g.functional]
2703	                    if f is not None and "generated" not in f.tags
2704	                )
2705	                for g in structured_native_functions
2706	            ],
2707	            "CompositeViewCopyKernel_Definitions": list(
2708	                mapMaybe(
2709	                    GenCompositeViewCopyKernel(
2710	                        backend_indices[
2711	                            DispatchKey.CompositeExplicitAutogradNonFunctional
2712	                        ]
2713	                    ),
2714	                    view_groups,
2715	                )
2716	            ),
2717	            "GeneratedCompositeFunctional_Definitions": list(
2718	                mapMaybe(
2719	                    gen_composite_functional_kernel,
2720	                    structured_native_functions,
2721	                )
2722	            ),
2723	            "GeneratedCompositeOut_Definitions": list(
2724	                mapMaybe(
2725	                    gen_composite_out_kernel,
2726	                    structured_native_functions,
2727	                )
2728	            ),
2729	        },
2730	    )

2745	    out the path to native_functions.yaml

3054	            native_functions=native_functions,
